fastProblem.headline: You already know something is off.
bullets: Manual work is eating your time.
You’re unsure what AI is worth implementing.

fastBridge.headline: Why this matters now
bullets: Most businesses buy tools before fixing bottlenecks.
The real win is fixing flow before adding complexity.

problem.headline: You already know something is off.
problem.p1: You've built a real business. Clients. Revenue. A team (even if it's small). Programs that get results.
problem.result_post: , growing slower than you should, and watching competitors who figured out automation pull ahead.
problem.worst: The worst part: You don’t know what you don’t know. You can’t fix what you can’t see.
problem.reveal: That’s exactly what this audit reveals.
painPoints: Your team copies data between tools by hand — and makes mistakes 20-30% of the time
Onboarding a new client takes 45 minutes of manual busywork across 5 different platforms
Clients disengage between sessions because there’s no system keeping them connected
You’re creating content nonstop just to keep people engaged — and it still isn’t enough
You hear about AI every day but have no idea what actually applies to YOUR business
You’ve tried ChatGPT — it’s interesting, but it didn’t move the needle on revenue or retention

bridge.headline: Here’s what changed.
bridge.p1_pre: Two years ago, automating your workflows meant hiring a developer, spending
bridge.p1_post: for something that probably wouldn’t work.
bridge.p2_pre: Today? The tools exist. Zapier. Make. n8n. Voice AI agents. Custom GPTs. They’re affordable, proven, and designed for
bridge.p3: The problem isn’t the tools. The problem is knowing which ones to use, where to use them, and in what order.
bridge.tagline: That’s what the audit gives you.
bridge.p4: We don’t sell software. We don’t build custom code. We diagnose your business like a doctor — find where you’re bleeding time, money, and clients — and prescribe the exact off-the-shelf tools that fix it.
bridge.quote: Think of it this way: you don’t need a surgeon. You need someone who can read the X-ray and tell you which vitamin to take.

offer.headline: The AI Transformation Audit & Implementation Report

cards.title: Full Business Workflow Audit
cards.body: We evaluate your top 3-5 most time-consuming processes end-to-end. Not surface-level observations — we document every step, every tool, every handoff, every pain point, and every error. You’ll see exactly where hours disappear, where errors compound, and where money leaks out of your operation.

cards.title: Scored Opportunity Matrix (VALUE Framework)
cards.body: Every process gets scored on 5 dimensions — Volume, Automatable %, Labor, User Impact, and Ease of implementation. Color-coded. Ranked. Prioritized. You’ll know instantly which processes to automate first for maximum impact.

cards.title: Tool-Matched Recommendations
cards.body: For each opportunity, we recommend the specific tool (Zapier, Make, n8n, AI agent, etc.), explain why it fits, estimate setup time, and flag any red flags. No guessing. No generic advice. Specific tools matched to your specific workflows.

cards.title: ROI Projections Using YOUR Numbers
cards.body: We calculate annual time savings, cost savings, and ROI using your actual hours, your actual rates, and your actual error costs. Not industry averages. Your data. You’ll see the dollar amount you’re leaving on the table.

cards.title: Professional 5-Page Audit Report
cards.body: Executive summary. Current state assessment. Opportunity matrix. Solution recommendations. Investment roadmap. Clean, branded, ready to share with your team or partners. This isn’t a slide deck with buzzwords — it’s a decision-making document with real numbers.

cards.title: 3-Tier Implementation Proposal
cards.body: Every audit includes three clear paths forward: Quick Wins (top automations in 2 weeks), Foundation (core transformation in 6-8 weeks), Full Transformation (complete overhaul in 12-16 weeks). You pick the pace and the budget. We do the work.

outcomes.headline: After your audit, you’ll have:
beforeAfter: Exact hours and dollars quantified per process
“I don’t know which AI tools to use”
Specific tools matched to your specific workflows
ROI calculated with your actual numbers (typically 200-500%)
Automated workflows running in weeks, not months
AI generating content in your voice — review, tweak, publish
“I hear about AI but don’t know where to start”
A prioritized, phased implementation roadmap in your hands

deliverables.headline: What You’re Actually Getting
deliverables.sub: This isn’t a vague PDF. It’s a comprehensive ROI-driven transformation strategy designed to be executed immediately.

items.title: Quantified Waste Analysis
items.description: We reveal exactly how many hours and dollars your team is losing to manual busywork, duplicate data entry, and broken workflows.

items.title: Precision Tool Selection
items.description: No more guessing. We match your specific pain points to the exact AI tools and automations that will solve them for good.

items.title: Implementation Roadmap
items.description: A step-by-step 90-day execution plan. We don’t just tell you what to fix; we show you exactly how to fix it, phase by phase.

midCTA.headline: Know exactly what your workflows are costing you — in 5 days.

process.headline: Simple. Fast. No disruption to your business.
process.time_investment: Total time investment from you: About 1 hour. We do the rest.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.body: You fill out a short questionnaire (10 minutes). We review it, then hop on a 30-minute call to go deeper. We learn your business, your tools, your pain.

steps.title: Process Documentation
steps.body: We map your top workflows step-by-step. Every trigger, every handoff, every bottleneck — documented.

steps.title: Scoring & Solution Matching
steps.body: We score each process using our VALUE framework, match opportunities to specific tools, and calculate ROI using your real data.

steps.title: Report & Proposal
steps.body: We assemble your complete audit report, generate your 3-tier implementation proposal, and activate your Digital Twin.

steps.title: Delivery Call
steps.body: We walk you through everything live. You leave with total clarity on what to do, in what order, and what it’ll cost vs. what it’ll save.

pricing.review_note: Every review is a verified client who found $20k+ in savings. That’s what moves the price.

pricing.guarantee_body_post: , you get a full refund. No questions asked.
pricing.guarantee_confidence: We’re that confident in what we’ll find — because we’ve never done an audit that didn’t find it.
includes: ROI projections using your actual numbers
Your first Digital Twin — activated and live

tierLabels.Early Access: You’re in before anyone else. Lowest price this will ever be.
tierLabels.Founding Member: 5 verified reviews. Proof is building. Price reflects it.
tierLabels.Early Adopter: 10 verified reviews. The results are speaking for themselves.

items.q: I’m not technical. Will I understand the report?
items.a: Absolutely. The entire report is written in plain English with clear visuals. No jargon, no code, no acronyms. If you can read a menu, you can read this report. We also walk through it live with you on a call.

items.q: What if AI doesn’t work for my type of business?
items.a: That’s exactly what the audit determines. If we find that automation won’t deliver ROI for a specific process, we tell you — and we tell you why. We’d rather save you money than sell you something that won’t work. That said, in every audit we’ve conducted, we’ve found significant savings.

items.q: How is this different from just using ChatGPT?
items.a: ChatGPT is a general tool. It doesn’t know your business, your workflows, your clients, or your numbers. We analyze YOUR specific operation, match solutions to YOUR specific problems, and calculate ROI with YOUR actual data. The Digital Twin is trained on YOUR content — it’s not generic AI.

items.q: I’ve been burned by consultants before.
items.a: We get it. That’s why we structured this as a fixed-price, fixed-timeline, guaranteed engagement. You know exactly what you’re getting, exactly when you’re getting it, and exactly what it costs. If we don’t deliver value, you get your money back.

items.q: Why is the audit priced so low?
items.a: Because the price reflects the proof — not the value. Right now we’re early. Every verified client review moves the price up. You’re getting in before the market catches up to what this is worth. Industry standard for this type of done-for-you AI assessment runs $5,000–$15,000. We’d rather earn your trust with results at a price that removes friction — and let the reviews speak for themselves.

You get three clear options: Quick Wins (2 weeks, highest-impact automations), Foundation (6-8 weeks, core transformation), or Full Transformation (12-16 weeks, everything). You choose what fits your budget and timeline. Or you take the report and implement it yourself — it’s yours either way.

items.q: How is the Digital Twin different from a chatbot?
items.a: A chatbot follows a script. Your Digital Twin is trained on your actual methodology, your content library, your voice, and your frameworks. It doesn’t give generic answers — it gives YOUR answers. It cites YOUR sources. It sends people back to YOUR content. And it keeps learning as you publish new material.

finalCTA.headline: You have two choices.
finalCTA.optionA_body: Keep doing things the way you’re doing them. Keep copying data by hand. Keep losing clients between sessions. Keep hearing about AI and wondering if it applies to you. Keep guessing.
finalCTA.optionB_post: and 1 hour of your time. In 5 days, know exactly where you’re losing money, exactly how to fix it, and exactly what it’ll save you. Walk away with a professional report, a clear roadmap, a working Digital Twin — and if you pay in full, your first Core AI System built and live at no extra cost.
